result:
Compiles successfully (warnings are all pre-existing). The Round 43 implementation is complete and working:

- **+407 lines** across `life.c`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and `README.md`
- `life.c`: correlation data structures, `corr_compute()` with two-point C(r) and exponential fit, per-cell local correlation heatmap, `corr_to_rgb()` color mapping, stats panel, status bar indicator, probe inspector integration, `&` key toggle, auto-refresh every 4 generations, demo system support
- `CHANGELOG.md`: Round 43 entry added
- `README.md`: keybinding table, analysis feature list, and new section documented

All changes are unstaged. Would you like me to commit them?
